creator: yasi@yasi.to
text:
www/plone, a Contents Management System for Zope, has been updated to
version 2.5.2 released January 16, 2007.

It includes:
  - Vulnerability fix (Hotfix 20061031.)
        NOTE: www/plone-2.5.1_1 already has this Hotfix.
  - minor fixes to External Editor, LiveSearch
  - and many other things
